name: Computer Science & Engineering
description: The Department of Computer Science & Engineering at Parul University offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs in core computer science, artificial intelligence, machine learning, and data science. The department is housed in the C.V. Raman Centre (A25) and has state-of-the-art computer labs, coding labs, and research facilities. Students from BTech CSE, BTech AI/ML, and BTech Data Science attend classes and labs here.

name: Information Technology
description: The Department of Information Technology is located in the C.V. Raman Centre (A25). It offers BTech IT programs with a focus on software development, networking, cybersecurity, and information systems. Labs and classrooms are on the 4th and 5th floors.

name: Computer Application (BCA)
description: The Department of Computer Application offers BCA and its specialized variants at Parul University. Classes are conducted in Bhagat Singh Bhawan (A24, N Block) from the 2nd to 6th floor. Labs are in the C.V. Raman Centre (A25). BCA students spend their practical sessions in A25 and theory classes in A24.
note: BCA classes are in A24 (Bhagat Singh Bhawan). BCA labs are in A25 (CV Raman Centre).

name: Master of Computer Application (MCA)
description: The MCA department is located in the C.V. Raman Centre (A25). The program focuses on advanced software development, cloud computing, AI, and enterprise applications. Both classes and labs are on the 5th and 6th floors of A25.

name: Mechanical Engineering
description: The Department of Mechanical Engineering is located in the main PIET block (A1). It offers BTech and MTech programs covering design, manufacturing, thermal engineering, and robotics. The engineering workshop in A20 is extensively used for practical sessions.

name: Civil Engineering
description: The Department of Civil Engineering is located in PIET (A1). It covers structural engineering, construction technology, environmental engineering, and transportation. The department has dedicated survey and material testing labs.

name: Electrical Engineering
description: The Department of Electrical Engineering is in PIET (A1). It covers power systems, control systems, electrical machines, and renewable energy. The department has dedicated power electronics and machines labs.

name: Electronics & Communication Engineering
description: The Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering is in PIET (A1). It covers digital electronics, communication systems, VLSI design, and embedded systems. The department has dedicated electronics and microprocessor labs.

name: Pharmacy
description: The Department of Pharmacy at Parul University is spread across multiple buildings including A4, A8, A10, and A21. B.Pharm and D.Pharm programs are primarily in A4. M.Pharm and research programs are in A8. The department has pharmaceutical chemistry labs, pharmacology labs, and a pharmaceutical manufacturing unit.

name: Nursing
description: The Department of Nursing is in Parul Institute of Nursing (A6). It offers B.Sc Nursing, M.Sc Nursing, and Post Basic B.Sc Nursing programs. Students receive clinical training at Parul Sevashram Hospital (E2).

name: Ayurved
description: The Department of Ayurved offers BAMS and MD Ayurved programs. Primary teaching block is A13, with advanced research at A18. Clinical training is conducted at Parul Ayurved Hospital (E1) and Khemdas Ayurved Hospital (E3).

name: Homoeopathy
description: The Department of Homoeopathy is in Jawaharlal Nehru Homoeopathic Medical College (A7) with research at A17. Clinical training is at E5. Offers BHMS and MD Homoeopathy programs.

name: Business Administration (MBA)
description: The Department of Business Administration is in Parul Institute of Business Administration (A14). It offers MBA and BBA programs with specializations in HR, Finance, Marketing, and Operations. The Faculty of Management Studies (A15) handles advanced management programs.

name: Law
description: The Department of Law is in Subhash Chandra Bose Bhawan (A23). It offers BA LLB, BBA LLB, and LLM programs. The department has a moot court room and a legal aid clinic.

name: Architecture
description: The Department of Architecture is in Parul Institute of Architecture & Research (A16). It offers B.Arch and M.Arch programs. The department has design studios, model-making labs, and a materials library.

name: Design & Fine Arts
description: The Department of Design and Fine Arts is in A22. It includes Parul Institute of Design, Parul Institute of Fine Arts, and Parul Institute of Performing Arts. The building also houses the 24 Frames Studio (A26) for film and media production.

name: Agriculture
description: The Department of Agriculture is in Subhash Chandra Bose Bhawan (A23). It offers B.Sc and M.Sc Agriculture programs covering crop science, soil science, agronomy, and agricultural technology.

name: Physiotherapy
description: The Department of Physiotherapy offers BPT and MPT programs. Basic physiotherapy is in A7, while research-focused programs are in A16. Clinical training is conducted at Parul Sevashram Hospital (E2).

name: Commerce
description: The Department of Commerce is in Subhash Chandra Bose Bhawan (A23). It offers B.Com, B.Com (Hons), and M.Com programs covering accounting, finance, taxation, and business economics.

name: Social Work
description: The Department of Social Work is in Subhash Chandra Bose Bhawan (A23). It offers BSW and MSW programs with field work placements in NGOs, hospitals, and community centres.

name: Hotel Management & Catering Technology
building_name: Parul Institute of Hotel Management & Catering Technology
description: The Department of Hotel Management is in A19. It offers B.Sc Hotel Management and Diploma programs. The department has a training kitchen, food production lab, and a housekeeping lab.

name: Applied Sciences
description: The Department of Applied Sciences is in A21. It offers B.Sc and M.Sc programs in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics. The department also provides foundational science courses to all engineering students in their first year.
